title: haplophyllum cordatum
intro: Haplophyllum cordatum, also known as the 'Tetradenia', is a flowering plant species belonging to the Rutaceae family. Traditionally, this plant has been used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Haplophyllum cordatum are attributed to its ability to alleviate symptoms of fever, cough, and respiratory issues, making it a valuable herb in traditional medicine. Haplophyllum cordatum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, which are commonly used in folk medicine to treat various ailments.
